description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Notepad Next that runs on push to master and tags, and on pull requests. The workflow has four jobs: build-linux, build-mac, build-windows, and github. The build-linux job builds Notepad Next on Ubuntu 18.04 and latest with Qt 5.15.2 and 6.2.4, and uploads the AppImage artifact. The build-mac job builds on macOS with Qt 5.15.2 and 6.2.4, and uploads the DMG artifact. The build-windows job builds on Windows with Qt 5.15.2 and 6.2.4, and uploads the zip package and installer artifacts. The github job drafts a GitHub release and uploads the artifacts.
